description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun with a long, blued steel barrel and a wooden stock and fore-end. The barrel is slender and extends well beyond the receiver, with a smooth, unvented top and no visible ribbing. The receiver and lever mechanism are metallic, with the lever loop positioned just behind the trigger guard, characteristic of lever-action firearms. The stock is made of polished wood, featuring a traditional full stock design with a straight comb and a slightly curved butt. The trigger guard is rounded and integrated with the lever, forming a continuous loop for finger placement. A single shotgun shell is displayed beneath the firearm, indicating its ammunition type and scale.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a long steel barrel, wooden full stock, and a rounded trigger guard integrated with the lever. The design is classic and robust, with a single shell shown for scale.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, long barrel, and lever-action mechanism.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the alignment of the stock and receiver.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the lever and trigger guard loop.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the width of the stock and the straight alignment of the barrel.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, long and smooth with no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Rounded and elongated, forming a continuous loop with the lever, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
